author.bio: A peer-to-peer hypermedia protocol to make the web faster, safer, and more open.
author.name: IPFS

content.text:
IPFS 0.5 is faster, more reliable and full of upgrades to make the user experience even better.
→ Adding data is 2x faster
→ DHT improvements help the network use up to 4x less bandwidth
→ Fetching content is 2-5x faster
Learn more: http://blog.ipfs.io/2020-04-28-go-ipfs-0-5-0/
